subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Though this heart-rending and soul-consuming calamity causeth sighs and lamentation night and day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله هر چند این مصیبت جانگداز و جگرسوز است و سبب آه و فغان شب و روز
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort
